ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who performed the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the track was released */,
  "length_ms" INTEGER /* Length of the track in milliseconds */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the track contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the track */,
  "bpm_range" TEXT /* Range of BPM (beats per minute) for the track */,
  "key_signature" TEXT /* Key signature of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "label" TEXT /* Name of the record label */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the album is a compilation */,
  "genres" TEXT /* JSON array of genres associated with the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "top_genre" TEXT /* Top genre of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object of links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "years_active" TEXT /* JSON array of the years the artist has been active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_top_genre FOREIGN KEY ("top_genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre */,
  "sub_genres" TEXT /* JSON array of sub-genres */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (city, country) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object of user preferences */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track involved in the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., play, skip, like, dislike) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in milliseconds (if applicable) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop, smart speaker) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user when the activity occurred */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "privacy_setting" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (e.g., public, private) */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* JSON array of IDs of users who can edit the playlist */,
  "num_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the playlist */,
  "playlist_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the playlist in milliseconds */,
  "genres" TEXT /* JSON array of the most common genres in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-track relationship */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "track_order" INTEGER /* Order of the track in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following the artist */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist being followed */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date the user followed the artist */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* JSON object of the user's notification preferences for the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_followers_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_ratings_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the album */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_ratings_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the artist */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_ratings_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the playlist */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was shared */,
  "share_url" TEXT /* URL to the shared playlist */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the playlist has been shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of share (e.g., social media, direct link) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_shares_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  "replies" TEXT /* JSON array of replies to the comment */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_comments_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  "replies" TEXT /* JSON array of replies to the comment */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
